notes: v0.2.14: Dual-channel input mode. Plug a mic into one input and a guitar into another, sing AND play simultaneously. Each channel gets its own effects chain (mic effects + instrument effects) and its own volume slider. Both mixed locally before sending — peer hears one mono stream, zero added latency. Configure via the new 'Instrument Channel (optional)' dropdown in the Setup screen. Defaults to None for backwards compatibility.
